author: claude
content: fix/obsolete-firefox-prefs #1140: clean (no conflicts despite expected FF152 pref churn — master's configure_firefox.py at v0.35.0 didn't touch the obsolete pref lines this branch removes); rebased -b 2 commits onto master 315e6672.
